description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Xbox One / Series that runs on push to master, pull request open or sync, and release publish, while ignoring changes to *.md and docs/**. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment with concurrency control. It checks out the code, sets up ccache, adds msbuild to PATH, configures git, installs gettext, builds the project, copies artifacts, uploads a package artifact, packages a release, and updates a release.
